footer.tagline: The International Chito-Ryu Karate-Do Federation promotes and preserves Chito-Ryu Karate-Do around the world.
footer.copyright: © {year} International Chito-Ryu Karate-Do Federation. All rights reserved.

home.heroDescription: Chito Ryu Karate-Do is one of the oldest styles of karate, founded in Okinawa and brought to the world through dedication, discipline and respect.
home.heroSlide2Description: Connecting dojos, instructors, and practitioners through tradition, excellence, and a shared global community.
home.originsDescription: O-Sensei was told by Arigaki Sensei that Karate-do originated approximately one thousand years ago in China. Based on this, O-Sensei named his style 'Chito Ryu', according to the origins of Karate-do.

accordion.title: The Meaning of CHI, TO, RYU
accordion.body: "Chi" refers to the Tang Dynasty of China, "To" also references China (the old name "To"/唐), and "Ryu" means style or school — together honoring the Chinese origins of the art within a Japanese style.

accordion.title: From Tang Dynasty to Okinawa
accordion.body: Karate-do's roots trace back roughly a thousand years to Chinese martial traditions of the Tang Dynasty, which travelled to and were refined on Okinawa over centuries before reaching mainland Japan.

accordion.title: Chitose Sensei and the Modern Era
accordion.body: O-Sensei Tsuyoshi Chitose consolidated these teachings into a single, coherent style in 1946, emphasizing safety, anatomical study, and preserving the practical fighting techniques often lost in sport-focused karate.

newsCards.title: Message from the Soke
newsCards.detail: Read the latest message from our Soke.

newsCards.title: New Dojo In Brazil
newsCards.detail: Chito Ryu continues to grow in South America.

home.ctaDescription: Find a certified dojo near you and begin your journey.
home.dojoFinderDescription: Find an official Chito Ryu dojo near you.

trustBar.label: Years of Tradition
trustBar.description: Rooted in over a century of tradition.

trustBar.label: Generations of Soke
trustBar.description: Preserving an unbroken lineage of leadership.

trustBar.label: Dojos
trustBar.description: A global network of recognized dojos.

home.philosophyDescription: Chito-Ryu emphasizes self-discipline, physical fitness, mental strength, and respect for others. Its training is for everyone—regardless of age, gender, or ability.
home.memberCountriesDescription: Officially representing National Chito-Ryu Associations across the world.
